'''Narvath''' was the [[Narvath (species)|Narvath]] [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]]. Many members of its local underground joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was later a member world of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}}
